# DeckX Player

> DeckX Player is a web runtime for opening `.deckx` HTML presentation packages with preview, presenter view, slideshow view, speaker notes, and motion controls.

DeckX is an AI-native HTML presentation format and player. It lets humans or LLM agents package HTML slides, Markdown speaker notes, deck styles, and local assets into a zip-based `.deckx` file that can be opened from a URL or local file.

English is the canonical discovery language for DeckX. Korean equivalents are published under `/ko/`.

## Primary Pages

- [Project landing](https://deckx-project.github.io/): English canonical landing page for DeckX positioning, concepts, demos, and player entry.
- [Korean landing](https://deckx-project.github.io/ko/): Korean version of the landing page.
- [Player](https://deckx-project.github.io/player): Open a `.deckx` URL, local `.deckx` zip, recent deck, or official sample.

## Core Concepts

- DeckX: The format and runtime name for exchangeable HTML presentations.
- DeckX Player: The browser-based runtime that opens `.deckx` packages and runs preview, presenter view, slideshow view, notes, timer, and motion controls.
- DeckX Package: A zip-based `.deckx` file containing `manifest.json`, `slides/`, `notes/`, `styles/`, and `assets/`.
- Safe Deck: The default DeckX mode. HTML/CSS/assets are allowed; scripts and inline event handlers are not allowed.

## Documentation

- [Full LLM context](https://deckx-project.github.io/llms-full.txt): Longer machine-readable summary, public documentation links, and recommended agent workflow.
- [Korean LLM context](https://deckx-project.github.io/ko/llms.txt): Korean companion context.
- [DeckX Package spec](https://deckx-project.github.io/docs/deckx-package.md): Package folder structure, manifest fields, slide contract, notes contract, and validation requirements.
- [Agent Deck Authoring Guide](https://deckx-project.github.io/docs/agent-deck-authoring.md): How humans and LLM agents should author DeckX source folders.
- [DeckX Manifest Schema](https://deckx-project.github.io/docs/deckx-manifest.schema.json): JSON Schema draft for `manifest.json`.
- [Packaging Strategy](https://deckx-project.github.io/docs/packaging-strategy.md): Online player and offline package direction.
- [MCP Strategy](https://deckx-project.github.io/docs/mcp-strategy.md): MCP and skill options under review, not yet a committed public product feature.

## Korean Documentation

- [DeckX Package spec - Korean](https://deckx-project.github.io/ko/docs/deckx-package.md)
- [Agent Deck Authoring Guide - Korean](https://deckx-project.github.io/ko/docs/agent-deck-authoring.md)
- [Packaging Strategy - Korean](https://deckx-project.github.io/ko/docs/packaging-strategy.md)
- [MCP Strategy - Korean](https://deckx-project.github.io/ko/docs/mcp-strategy.md)

## Discovery Files

- [Robots policy](https://deckx-project.github.io/robots.txt): Crawler access policy and sitemap pointer.
- [Sitemap](https://deckx-project.github.io/sitemap.xml): Canonical public URLs, language alternates, LLM context, and public docs.

## Starter Project

- [DeckX starter repository](https://github.com/deckx-project/deckx-starter-basic): Public starter repo for creating a first DeckX deck. The landing links to the repository only; packaged starter deck publication is handled separately.

## Official Sample Decks

- [DeckX starter repo](https://github.com/deckx-project/deckx-starter-basic): Public starter repository with README, AGENTS.md, validation scripts, and a minimal DeckX source folder.
- [DeckX starter demo](https://deckx-project.github.io/player?deck=/decks/starter-basic.deckx#landing): Packaged preview of the starter deck.
- [DeckX zip demo](https://deckx-project.github.io/player?deck=/decks/deckx-player-demo.deckx#landing): Dogfooding deck explaining DeckX Player itself.
- [Static framework demo](https://deckx-project.github.io/player?deck=/decks/static-demo.deckx#landing): Text-focused DeckX runtime explanation.
- [Motion graphics demo](https://deckx-project.github.io/player?deck=/decks/motion-demo.deckx#landing): CSS animation demo with Full, Reduced, and Paused motion modes.
- [Classic 4:3 demo](https://deckx-project.github.io/player?deck=/decks/classic-4x3-demo.deckx#landing): Aspect ratio handling sample.
- [Image-heavy demo](https://deckx-project.github.io/player?deck=/decks/image-heavy-demo.deckx#landing): Package-local image asset loading sample.
- [Long 120-slide demo](https://deckx-project.github.io/player?deck=/decks/long-120-demo.deckx#landing): Long deck navigation, search, and overview sample.
- [Long image demo](https://deckx-project.github.io/player?deck=/decks/long-image-demo.deckx#landing): Long deck plus package-local image stress sample.

## Authoring Shape

```text
my-talk/
  manifest.json
  slides/
    001-intro.html
  notes/
    001-intro.md
  styles/
    theme.css
  assets/
    hero.png
```

Build and validate local examples with:

```bash
npm run pack:deckx
npm run validate:deckx
npm run build
```

## Repository

- Source repository: https://github.com/deckx-project/deckx-player-dev
- Public Pages deployment: https://github.com/deckx-project/deckx-project.github.io
